query: We are finishing this delivery. Can you run close and tell me if signoff is truly done?
I need a closure-ready summary: acceptance, handover, lessons, and archive follow-through.
Close this project lane and show what still blocks formal closure.
Signoff is done; package final evidence and archive notes for retrieval.
Operational handoff may be risky before close. Route me to the right close workflow.
Capture lessons learned from this finished project and map next actions.
Create a sprint plan for next week with priorities and estimates.
Can you triage new support tickets and tell me what needs response today?
Write a SQL query to aggregate monthly revenue by customer segment.
Set up CI checks for unit tests and linting on pull requests.
Draft kickoff notes for a new implementation project with roles and timeline.
Summarize this markdown doc in five bullets.
